content.en:
Ouyang Jiu'er sensed Ye Tian's arrival and came out.

"Thank you!"

Ouyang Jiu'er was also very happy, being able to break through to the invincible True Ancestor combat power, which meant too much to her.

Immediately, Ouyang Jiu'er also stared at Ye Tian carefully for a while, and said in surprise: "Brother Ye, have you reached the extreme of the Invincible True Ancestor?"

"How do you tell?"

Ye Tian was curious.

Ouyang Jiu'er said: "I once saw a Supreme True Ancestor, and you have a special charm on you, which is the vision that you are about to step into the Supreme True Ancestor, but ordinary people can't see it. Of course, although you have reached the extreme of the Invincible True Ancestor, it is also very difficult to step into the Supreme True Ancestor!"

"I understand!" Ye Tian nodded.

Ye Tian went to Ouyang Jiu'er's residence to sit for a while, chatted for a while, and then left.

He knew very well that Ouyang Jiu'er, who had just broken the shackles, would definitely usher in a rapid increase in strength next, and perhaps he would soon step from an ordinary invincible true ancestor to a top invincible true ancestor level.

After all, if a half-step domain ancestor reincarnated was free of shackles, the speed at which he could increase his strength would be extremely terrifying.

this day.

Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue, who were already at the True Monarch level, asked Ye Tianlai to go out to practice, and they were not training in the Void Heaven True Country, but to leave the Void Heaven True Kingdom.

The two of them have traveled to many places in the Void Heaven True Country, and now they want to go to the world outside the Void Heaven True Country to see and understand.

Originally, Ye Tian was ready to refuse, because Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue were only at the True Monarch level, and although their strength was stronger than many half-step True Ancestors, they still couldn't beat those powerful True Ancestors.

However, after thinking about it carefully, Ye Tian still agreed.

When Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue left, Ye Tian brought ten True Ancestors out of the Nine Extremes Space, none of them were ordinary True Ancestors, but elite True Ancestors, and they were relatively close to the top True Ancestor level.

"You are secretly protecting the two little ones, Xingchen and Xingyue, this is your task, and you can't let them find out. As long as there is no life-and-death crisis, you don't need to make a move, understand?" Ye Tian ordered.

"Yes, General!"

The ten True Ancestors of the Nine Extremes Legion answered.

Whew!

The ten True Ancestors disappeared in an instant.

......

this day.

The representatives of the Upper Triple Heaven Forces gathered together and opened a meeting that would determine the future direction of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and the True Ancestors who could come to the meeting were all Invincible True Ancestors.

Presiding over this meeting were the three Nine Heavenly Forces and the eighteen Eight Heavenly Forces, all of which were Seventh Heaven Forces.

The three Nine Heavens forces are the Heavenly Sea Sect, the Mitian Sect, and the Ten Thousand Domains Temple.

These three Nine Heavens forces are all very ancient forces, and they have more than one Nine Heavens Invincible Dao Ancestor, and it is rumored that there is a half-step domain ancestor among the three Nine Heavens forces.

But this is a rumor, as for whether it is true or not, no one knows.

And the eighteen eightfold heavenly forces are also powerful forces among the upper three heavenly forces, such as the Heavenly Sword Sect, while the sevenfold heavenly forces are forces like the Zixia Sect.

The total number of forces in the Upper Triple Heaven was more than a hundred, and the combined power was very terrifying and powerful. Any Upper Triple Heaven Force can easily crush all the Middle Triple Heaven Forces.

"Didn't you ask for Black Wind Mountain this time?"

Someone asked.

The representative of the Tianhai Sect, Hebo True Ancestor, said: "Black Wind Mountain is not rated as the Upper Triple Heaven Force, and they are too mysterious, and they do not participate in any meetings and actions of the Upper Triple Heaven Force at all, so naturally we can't ask them, what if they leak the news?"

"That's what Hebo True Ancestor said!"

Many Invincible True Ancestors nodded their heads one after another.

Immediately, Hebo True Ancestor continued: "After such a long time, I think that almost all the True Ancestors of the major Triple Heaven Forces have awakened and recovered almost, and we have also adapted to the rules of the Dao Mountain Realm, plus we have obtained some advanced treasures when we crossed the Dark Forbidden Domain, and now the strength of the True Ancestor level of the major forces has also recovered to a certain extent. But those forces in the Dao Mountain Realm have grown stronger one by one with the help of our inheritance and resources, and although many forces have taken refuge in us, most of them still haven't taken refuge. If we continue on this trend, with their huge number of True Ancestors, they may really dare to attack us one day. "

"How dare they, just with their rabble, if they dare to attack our Upper Triple Heaven Forces, then destroy them!" said the Zi Chi True Ancestor of the Zixia Sect.

"Hahaha, other people are still qualified to say this, and you Zixia Sect are also worthy?" Xuanjia True Ancestor, who was also a member of the Sevenfold Heaven Force Balong True Sect, mocked: "I remember that your Zixia Sect almost wiped out all of your True Ancestors not long ago! Now, the strength of your Zixia Sect at the level of True Ancestor has dropped greatly, and I am afraid that they are all about to fall out of the category of the Seventh Heaven Force, and they may not be stronger than some of the top Six Heaven Forces!"

"You ......"

Purple Crimson True Ancestor was furious.

"Stop arguing!"

King Kong City's Unbroken True Ancestor said: "The indigenous forces of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm should not be underestimated, such as the Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor, who is almost the first True Ancestor of our Xuanxu Ancient Realm, can anyone present defeat the Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor?"

As soon as these words came out, the audience fell silent.

The Ten Thousand Law True Ancestor is not an ordinary invincible True Ancestor, the strongest attack record, the strongest defense record, and the strongest speed record, these three records are too terrifying.

The Unbroken True Ancestor is the True Ancestor who has created the strongest defense record before, and they are also more familiar with the Unbroken True Ancestor, and they know how perverted the defense of the Unbroken True Ancestor is, even if the strength of the Hebo True Ancestor is stronger than the Unbroken True Ancestor, but they can't break the defense of the Unbroken True Ancestor, they can only trap the Unbroken True Ancestor, and then use the long years to consume the Unbroken True Ancestor.

But the Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor is different, not only does it have a defense that is even more perverted than the True Ancestor who does not break it, but it also has the strongest attack and the strongest speed, who can beat the Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor?

"That's right, the indigenous forces should not be underestimated!" said the Wanyang True Ancestor of the Mitian Sect, "After all, our forces are only a part of the Upper Triple Heaven forces from one domain of the Divine Heaven Realm, and we are facing the forces of an entire realm. Although there are very few powerhouses in the Dao Mountain Realm, they have a lot of geniuses, and in the past, it was only difficult to develop due to the weak inheritance. But now, they have obtained a lot of inheritances from the Divine Heaven Realm, and once they rise in the future, we can't contain them at all. "

"Yes, so while they haven't risen yet, we will destroy some of the resisting forces and subdue the others, so that we can recruit geniuses from the Xuanxu Ancient Realm at will and strengthen our own strength. At that time, the overlord of the Dao Mountain Realm will be our Upper Triple Heaven forces, not those indigenous forces!"

"So what should I do?

There is an invincible true ancestor asked.

Hebo Zhenzu pondered for a while, and then spoke: "First try to recruit some indigenous forces, and then let the indigenous forces fight for us when the time comes." In addition, it is also necessary to unite those Middle Triple Heaven forces, although the strength of the Middle Triple Heaven forces is not strong, but the number of Middle Triple Heaven forces is large, and there are many True Ancestors who have accumulated. Once our Upper Triple Heaven Forces and Middle Triple Heaven Forces attack with all their might, even if those indigenous forces are all united, they will be just ants. "

Next, more than a hundred Upper Triple Heaven forces began to discuss the specific situation in detail.

The meeting lasted three days and three nights, and finally the general plan was finalized.

-------------------

this day.

The bloody general of the Black Wind Mountain contacted Ye Tian and told Ye Tian a message that the Upper Triple Heaven forces were preparing to take action against the indigenous forces in the Daoshan Realm, and asked him to be careful.

"The Upper Triple Heaven Force wants to make a move against the forces of the Dao Mountain Realm!"

Ye Tian was also shocked by this news.

Obviously, Black Wind Mountain definitely did not participate in this plan, otherwise he, as one of the four great generals of Black Wind Mountain, would not be unaware.

And how the bloody general knew, he didn't know very well, it was nothing more than arranging for spies to enter the Upper Triple Heaven forces.

He didn't have the heart to speculate about this, what he was worried about now was whether the Void Innocence Kingdom would be affected.

If the Void Innocence Kingdom had not been attacked, he was not very worried.

As for changing the situation and helping the Daoshan Realm, he couldn't do it.

Anyone can see that these Upper Triple Heaven forces in the Haohai Sea Realm are far superior to the forces in the Dao Mountain Realm, if it weren't for the Dao Ancestors in the Hao Sea Realm who were still asleep and couldn't wake up completely, I am afraid that even the entire Dao Mountain Realm would fall into their hands.

"I can only try to keep the Void Heaven True Country, if there are forces that really dare to invade the Void Heaven True Country, then don't blame me for killing on a killing spree!" Ye Tian said fiercely.
